_status: PLACEHOLDER — the deployed app/website doesn't exist yet. This instance activates when apps/ + services/ get built out.
loom_description: User-facing deployed surface for SDE Extraction — website + backend + frontend. Activates when research drives a product shape and the build begins.
activates_when: Liz decides the research has surfaced a product worth building. At that point: populate apps/, services/, fill in this instance's configs with real values, register with the-loom Project Registry, set LOOM_PROJECT_ID=sde-extraction-app on the deployment platform (NOT in the repo's local .env).
